content: (GIET LINIVERSITY) OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS U ——— Ref. No. V552 /GIETU/Exam/2025 Date: - 29/10/2025 NOTICE This is for information of the Ph.D. Scholars that, the Registration and Form Fill up for I' Semester Regular Examinations of 2025 — Summer Batch will be held as per the schedule given below. -— SI.LNo | Programme Batch Semester | Registration | Form Fill up | Date(s) of Registration Fees Fees and Form Fill up +— 31% Oct’ 2025 1, Ph.D. Summer - 2025 1% Rs. 2000/- Rs. 1500/- to 05" Nov’ 2025 > Students are advised to clear their dues before the form fill up. » Students are advised to submit the filled in Registration and Form Fill up forms along with the Xerox Copy of the money receipt to their respective Head of the Department. » Application Received after the due date will not be considered. » The Examination will commence from 6" Dec’ 2025 to 8" Dec’ 2025. Contnoller of Examinations Memo No: (§ SS(QQGIETU/Exam Date: 29.10.2025 Copy to: The Vice-Chancellor / Registrar / Dean Academics / Dean SoET for information. All HoDs / Ph.D. Coordinators for information and necessary action. Accounts Section / Library / ERP / E-Class. -~ WW% GIET University Website/Notice Board. Controller of Examinations GIET University
